name_en: B brand pure original olive green shoulder bag, underarm bag. Absolutely factory original! 100% all-imported fabric with cowhide. The adjustable strap can be lengthened. The strap features Burberry letter embroidery in jacquard. Also comes with a detachable handle for crossbody or hand carry. The flap has a magnetic snap, very secure. Perfect quality and details! Dimensions: 24 x 8 x 14 cm
